title: CreeperFix
description: Mod to choose what kind of damage creepers can do.
body:
Just bugfixed version of [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/creeperfix](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/creeperfix) for Forge 1.12.2.

Config file (config/creeperfix.cfg) contains options to protect these from creeper damage:
* Blocks, Itemframes, Paintings (default)
* Ground Items (default)
* Animals/Villagers (default)
* Players
* Hostile Mobs

Other entities affected by mobGriefing gamerule are not touched by this mod.
